mapper.sql: region_id, code, name, display_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO region (region_id, code, name, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{regionId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{displayOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM region WHERE region_id = #{regionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM region WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM region WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY display_order NULLS LAST, code LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM region WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM dormitory WHERE region = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL
